qa_pairs.question: What is the installation process for CASTEP version 20.11 on a cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To install CASTEP version 20.11, first obtain the `CASTEP-20.11.tar.gz` archive file from castep.org. Then, upload this file to your `/home/$USER` directory on the cluster. On the cluster, execute the command `eb CASTEP-20.11-iofbf-2020a.eb --sourcepath=$HOME --disable-enforce-checksums`. After the command finishes, log out and log back into the cluster.

qa_pairs.question: How do users load the CASTEP module and execute a CASTEP job on a compute node?
qa_pairs.answer: To use CASTEP, first load the module with `module load castep`. On a compute node, the CASTEP executable can be run as an MPI application using `srun castep.mpi seedname`, where `seedname.cell` and `seedname.param` are the required input files.
